generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security frameworks fall short. The 2024 National Security Review (NSR) confirms we need expanded domestic powers to preempt threats. While some worry about civil liberties, the NSR shows targeted expansions actually reduce overreach by creating clear protocols. Our allies in NATO have implemented similar measures with no erosion of democratic norms. It's time to modernize our approach - security without smart tools is just wishful thinking. #NationalSecurity #Modernization
